entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by rust disease, specifically in forage and grain production.

entities.name: PUCCINIA SUBSTRIATA VAR INDICA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in pearl millet.

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A major disease affecting pearl millet, particularly during the postrainy cool season.

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet breeding lines to resist infection by Puccinia substriata var indica.

entities.name: POSTRAINY COOL SEASON
entities.description: The specific climatic period (rabi) when rust disease is most prevalent in pearl millet.

entities.name: FIELD SCREEN
entities.description: The process of evaluating breeding lines for rust resistance under natural epiphytotic conditions in a nursery.

entities.name: DISEASE NURSERY
entities.description: The site where breeding lines are evaluated for disease resistance under natural conditions.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: A controlled environment used for artificial inoculation to confirm rust resistance.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of intentionally infecting potted seedlings with a pathogen to confirm resistance.

entities.name: ICMB 96222
entities.description: A specific B-line of pearl millet confirmed to be resistant to rust.

entities.name: ICMR 0699
entities.description: A specific R-line of pearl millet confirmed to be resistant to rust.

entities.name: ICMP 451-P8
entities.description: A specific R-line of pearl millet confirmed to be resistant to rust.

entities.name: ICMP 451-P6
entities.description: A specific R-line of pearl millet confirmed to be resistant to rust.
